title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c: mutex defined but not yet used in any access paths; all deaddrop_get/post/confessions_post and init must lock/unlock around s_dtn_buffer accesses
description: File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:9-70. Per native.c pattern and Zephyr thread safety (CoAP service thread vs workqueue vs routing). Tag: codereview. Discovered in pass 1 after first chunk.
